entries.name: Nokia
entries.explanation: nokia.fi = phone company. MANUAL_OVERRIDES already has nokiankaupunki.fi. Will be fixed on next postprocess run.

entries.name: Outokumpu
entries.explanation: outokumpu.fi = steel company. MANUAL_OVERRIDES already has outokummunkaupunki.fi. Will be fixed on next postprocess run.

entries.name: Kristiinankaupunki
entries.explanation: Bilingual Swedish-speaking municipality. krs.fi abbreviation for Kristinestad. Website confirmed at kristinestad.fi but email on krs.fi.

entries.name: Luoto
entries.explanation: Swedish-speaking municipality uses Swedish name Larsmo. Website confirmed at larsmo.fi. Standard bilingual pattern.

entries.name: Indre Østfold
entries.explanation: Abbreviation IO = Indre Østfold. Website shows 'Indre Østfold kommune'. Standard Norwegian pattern.

entries.name: Aurskog-Høland
entries.explanation: Known exception per CLAUDE.md. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: Evje og Hornnes
entries.explanation: Abbreviation E-H. Website confirmed: 'Evje og Hornnes kommune'.

entries.name: Midtre Gauldal
entries.explanation: Known exception per CLAUDE.md. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: Bø
entries.explanation: ø→oe transliteration in domain. Website shows 'Bø kommune'.

entries.name: Sarpsborg
entries.explanation: Known exception per CLAUDE.md. Uses .com TLD. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: København
entries.explanation: KK = Københavns Kommune. Official municipal site confirmed. Text shows 'borgerservice, pasning og skole'.

entries.name: Rødovre
entries.explanation: RK = Rødovre Kommune. Website confirmed municipal, shows Rødovre services.

entries.name: Høje-Taastrup
entries.explanation: HTK = Høje-Taastrup Kommune. Abbreviation pattern. Unreachable but has Microsoft MX.

entries.name: Faaborg-Midtfyn
entries.explanation: FMK = Faaborg-Midtfyn Kommune. Website confirmed.

entries.name: Ærø
entries.explanation: Ærø Kommune with oe transliteration. Unreachable but domain pattern correct.

entries.name: Lyngby-Taarbæk
entries.explanation: LTK = Lyngby-Taarbæk Kommune. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: Bornholm
entries.explanation: BRK = Bornholms Regionskommune. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: Ringkøbing-Skjern
entries.explanation: RKSK abbreviation. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: Læsø
entries.explanation: æ→ae, ø→oe transliteration. Unreachable but domain pattern correct.

entries.name: Skeiða- og Gnúpverjahreppur
entries.explanation: SOG abbreviation. Unknown provider + unreachable website. Needs further check but domain pattern plausible.

entries.name: Rangárþing ytra
entries.explanation: RY abbreviation. Website shows 'Rangárþing ytra' municipal content.

entries.name: Eyja- og Miklaholtshreppur
entries.explanation: EMH abbreviation. Independent provider, unreachable. Pattern is plausible.

entries.name: Grímsnes- og Grafningshreppur
entries.explanation: GOGG abbreviation. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: Grýtubakkahreppur
entries.explanation: Grenivík is the main village. Website confirmed municipal — shows Grenivík services.

entries.name: Hrunamannahreppur
entries.explanation: Flúðir is the main village. Website confirmed municipal — shows Hrunamannahreppur content.

entries.name: Mýrdalshreppur
entries.explanation: Vík í Mýrdal is the main village. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: Rangárþing eystra
entries.explanation: Hvolsvöllur is the main town. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: Dalabyggð
entries.explanation: Dalir = the Dales region. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: Skaftárhreppur
entries.explanation: Klaustur (Kirkjubæjarklaustur) is the main settlement. Website confirmed municipal.

entries.name: Snæfellsbær
entries.explanation: SNB abbreviation. Website confirmed municipal.

SE.note: Zero flagged — all 290 Swedish municipalities have good name-domain matches

patterns_discovered: Danish municipalities consistently use 2-4 letter abbreviations of 'Kommune' name (kk=København, rk=Rødovre, htk=Høje-Taastrup, etc.)
Icelandic hreppur municipalities use main village/settlement name as domain, not the hreppur name
Icelandic compound hreppur names use abbreviations (gogg, emh, ry, snb, sogsveit)
Norwegian municipalities use abbreviations + .kommune.no or short .no domains
Finnish bilingual municipalities use Swedish name for domain (Luoto→larsmo, Kristiinankaupunki→krs)
Finnish Nokia/Outokumpu corporate namesakes already handled in MANUAL_OVERRIDES
